compiled_state.title: [end-session]: merge-to-main invoked via direct script path -> should use dso shim
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

The /dso:end-session skill invokes merge-to-main using a direct script path instead of the .claude/scripts/dso shim.

## Expected Behavior

All plugin scripts must be invoked via the shim: `.claude/scripts/dso merge-to-main`

## Actual Behavior

end-session calls the script directly (e.g., `plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh`) bypassing the shim layer.

## Impact

Violates the shim contract enforced by check-shim-refs.sh pre-commit hook. Direct script references are fragile to path changes and bypass any shim-level dispatch logic.

comments.body: Mechanical fix: updated CLAUDE.md line 28 (Quick Reference table) and line 177 (Task Completion Workflow comment) — both had direct path plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh; corrected to .claude/scripts/dso merge-to-main.sh. end-session/SKILL.md was already correct.
comments.author: Test
